title: BEM-848 execute 847 next
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols','governance/workflow_dispatch_results']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 20:01 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
b847=load('governance/state/bem847_route_after_bem846.json')
route=b847.get('status')
real=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            bad='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low
            ok=('bem840' in low or 'protocol agreement' in low or 'bem844' in low) and 'DECISION:' in up and not bad
            if ok: real.append({'path':str(p),'text':txt})
if route=='process_real_bem840_response_next' and real:
    latest=real[-1]
    protocol=Path('governance/protocols/BEM840_AGREED_PROTOCOL_DRAFT_FROM_CLAUDE.md')
    protocol.write_text('# BEM-840 | Agreed Protocol Draft From Claude Response'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Source: '+latest['path']+sep+sep+latest['text']+sep)
    status='protocol_draft_created_from_real_response'
    next_action='review protocol draft and continue implementation'
elif route=='repair_dispatch_result_writer_next':
    # Create explicit synthetic result for the processor itself, not claiming Claude dispatch success.
    marker=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem848_result_writer_probe.status.json')
    marker.write_text(json.dumps({'status':'result_writer_probe_created','note':'This proves repository result writer path can create files; it is not a Claude dispatch success. Next repair must make queue processor emit real dispatch status.','time':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='result_writer_probe_created_not_claude_dispatch'
    next_action='verify queue processor emits real dispatch status; then runtime/response'
else:
    status='route_unresolved_continue_diagnosis'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-847 route '+str(route)+' and real response count '+str(len(real))
state={'bem':'BEM-848','status':status,'bem847_status':route,'real_response_count':len(real),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem848_execute_bem847_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem848_execute_bem847_next.md').write_text('# BEM-848 | Execute BEM-847 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem848_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-848'+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem848_execute_bem847_next.json','governance/reports/bem848_execute_bem847_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem848_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if status=='protocol_draft_created_from_real_response': changed.append('governance/protocols/BEM840_AGREED_PROTOCOL_DRAFT_FROM_CLAUDE.md')
if status=='result_writer_probe_created_not_claude_dispatch': changed.append('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem848_result_writer_probe.status.json')
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-847 next action: either created protocol draft from real Claude response or created result-writer probe without faking Claude dispatch')
"""
